## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds with no type errors
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if user-facing
- [ ] README updated if API surface changed
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified in PR body)
